//: cila component config (Next App Router). The free premium registries below are pulled via the shadcn MCP / CLI: `npx shadcn add @magicui/<name>`, etc. Each registry-item.json carries its own cssVars — after adding, run the shadcn audit checklist and reconcile tokens into src/styles/tokens.css (the single source of truth). NOTE: React/Next can use the R3F/motion templates/wow Tier-2 components directly (no island wrapper needed) — `motion/OrchestratedHero` imports straight in; `three`-based ones via next/dynamic({ ssr:false }).
